name: emoji-translator
description: AI-powered human language <-> emoji translator (decoupled monorepo)

scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @emoji/api build && pnpm --filter @emoji/web build
